{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/dry_grass.png
|block_health=7
|tool=[[Shover]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Dry grass is a grass block grown on [[dirt]].

== Obtaining ==
Dry grass is found in many dry or hot biomes. It is not possible to obtain grass blocks, as when they are broken, they drop their soil block.

== Usage ==
Grass blocks can be broken to obtain their soil block.

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Grass]]
